title: Blue-Coat.
content:
His dressing-gown's blue, and
        His girdle is red;
    He wears a black cap
        On top of his head.

    He carries a candle
        To give you a light,
    In case you should ever
        Get up in the night.
meaning:
Richard Hunter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Blue-Coat."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
